title: Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala
tagline: Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Parashurama Theme Park is a tourist destination built on Ummikkal hill in Bailur near Karkala in Udupi district.
overview.description: Parashurama Theme Park is a tourist destination built on Ummikkal hill in Bailur near Karkala in Udupi district. A bronze statue of Lord Vishnu's sixth avatar, Parashurama, is placed on the top of the building on the hill. This bronze statue is 33 feet tall, holding an axe in right hand, bow in left hand and raised left leg. The project has been started at an estimated cost of Rs 10 core in collaboration with Department of Tourism, Kannada and Cultural and other departments.

topPlaces.name: Attur, Udupi
topPlaces.description: Attur is a small village in Karkal taluk, Udupi District, Karnataka state, India. It comes under Nitte panchayat and is a part of Mysore Division.

topPlaces.name: Kanajaru
topPlaces.description: Kanajaru or Kanajar is a small village approximately 78 km north of Mangalore, 18 km west of Karkala and 33 km east of Udupi. Kanajaru is part of Karkala Taluk in Udupi District, Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar
topPlaces.description: Our Lady of Lourdes Church is a historic Roman Catholic Church dedicated to Our Lady of Lourdes situated at Kanajar near Karkala, India. The church was built in 1938.

topPlaces.description: Bommarabettu is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Udupi taluk of Udupi district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.description: 33 Shiroor is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located on the banks of the Seetha River in the Udupi taluk of Udupi district, Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Sri Venkataramana Temple, Karkala
topPlaces.description: Sri Venkataramana Temple, Karkala, also known as Padutirupathi, is a temple in Karnataka, India. It was built by Goud Saraswat Brahmins of Karkala and was installed on 25 April 1537.

topPlaces.name: Pernankila
topPlaces.description: Pernankila (also Peranankila) is a village near Hiryadka of Udupi taluk in Udupi district. It is a mid-sized village located in Udupi district in the state of Karnataka in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala?
faq.a: The best time to visit Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (36 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala?
faq.a: Stays in Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Parashurama Theme Park, Karkala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Attur, Udupi, Kanajaru, Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Kanajar, Bommarabettu, 33 Shiroor.
